response: Payments for Claude plans are generally non‑refundable unless specifically covered in our Consumer Terms of Service. To request a refund that may be eligible, please follow the instructions in the refund guide: https://www.anthropic.com/legal/consumer-terms and the “Requesting a refund for a paid Claude plan” article. If you believe this payment qualifies, submit the request through the prescribed process outlined there.
justification: The refund policy is detailed in Section 3, which states all payments are non‑refundable except as expressly provided in the Consumer Terms of Service, and directs users to follow the refund request instructions.

response:
Claude for Excel uses the same usage limits as your existing Claude account and the context window size is fixed for your plan. You cannot increase the context window size or switch to a larger model within Claude for Excel. To avoid the “Context Window Exceeded” error, reduce the size of the data you send at once (e.g., split the CSV into smaller chunks) or process the file in multiple steps.

For more details on why the context window cannot be increased, see the usage limits documentation.

If you need additional assistance, please contact support.
justification: Section 1 states Claude for Excel inherits the same usage limits as the Claude account; Section 2 explains the context window size cannot be increased, only optimized by reducing input size. No documentation provides a way to switch models within Claude for Excel.
